# Increase Volume – Sound Boost

> Make any audio or video louder on iPhone. Boost volume up to 10x while enhancing clarity, depth, and bass for music, videos, podcasts, and voice notes.

## Entity snapshot
- Name: Increase Volume – Sound Boost
- Category: iOS utility app (audio and video loudness enhancement)
- Primary use case: raise volume on quiet local media files on iPhone
- Core workflow: import -> boost -> preview -> save
- App Store listing: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6741472421
- App Store id: 6741472421

## By the numbers
- Maximum loudness claim: up to 10x boost
- Website locales: 14 language-specific pages
- Primary platform: iPhone (iOS)
- Public website: https://volumeboosting.com/
- Last website build date: 2026-04-26

## Main sections
- [Home](https://volumeboosting.com/): Product overview, use cases, screenshots, and App Store link
- [FAQ](https://volumeboosting.com/#geo-faq-heading): Direct answers to common product questions

- [Privacy policy](https://volumeboosting.com/privacy.html): Data and privacy details
- [Terms of service](https://volumeboosting.com/terms.html): Legal terms

## LLM-ready Q&A facts
### What is Increase Volume – Sound Boost?
Increase Volume – Sound Boost is an iPhone app that increases loudness for quiet audio and video files and then exports a louder version.

### How does Increase Volume – Sound Boost work?
The app workflow is import media, apply loudness enhancement, preview the result, and save the boosted output.

### How much can it increase loudness?
The product claim is up to 10x volume boost, depending on source material quality and headroom.

### What media types is it used for?
It is used for music tracks, podcasts, voice notes, and video clips that are difficult to hear at normal device volume.

### Where can users download it?
Users can download it from the Apple App Store at https://apps.apple.com/app/id6741472421.

### Is this an Android app?
No public Android listing is referenced on the website. The published listing is for iPhone on the Apple App Store.

## Contact and policies
- Website: https://volumeboosting.com/
- Privacy: https://volumeboosting.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://volumeboosting.com/terms.html

Last updated: 2026-04-26
